title: Refactor: Replace conditional with polymorphism
original_text: Refactored to replace conditional with polymorphism. Replaced switch statements with polymorphic dispatch. Added strategy classes for different behaviors. Implemented polymorphic interface. Improved code extensibility. Result: conditional replacement complete.

- Add strategy classes for different behaviors
